data.description: South Korean President: Returning energy supplies to pre-war levels will take a long time
Platinum prices fall over 3%, last at $1,902.25 per ounce.
JGB 2-year yield up 3.5 basis points at 1.380%.
South Korea’s President Lee says energy supply normalization to pre-war levels will take time.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump As Trump Vows To Hit Iran 'Hard'; Tesla Deliveries Due
data.description: Stock market futures experienced a decline while oil prices surged after President Trump declared that the U.S. will intensify pressure on Iran for the next 2-3 weeks. The Dow Jones futures dropped, and the imminent Tesla deliveries were highlighted alongside this development.
U.S. yields increase to 4.38% as Dec Fed fund futures decline by 6.5 ticks.
Berenberg lifts Glencore’s target price to 630p.
South Korea’s President Lee cautions that economic recovery could taper off.
South Korea’s President Lee states the Middle East situation is considered the most serious threat to energy security.
EuroStoxx 50 and DAX futures slide 2.0% and 1.9%, while FTSE futures fall 0.8%.
South Korea’s President Lee seeks prompt parliamentary approval of the extra budget.
Berenberg lifts BHP to Hold from Sell while reducing price target to 2500p.

data.title: Dogecoin Bracing For A 'Major Price Move,' Says Analyst After Noting This Chart Pattern
data.description: An experienced analyst has predicted significant volatility for Dogecoin (DOGE) amidst geopolitical concerns facing the cryptocurrency market. The Bollinger Bands on DOGE are currently squeezed between $0.874 and $0.101, indicating a forthcoming major price movement. This phenomenon occurs when volatility decreases, causing the bands to tighten. Traders view a price close outside of the bands as a potential breakout signal, often signaling the beginning of new trends after consolidation periods. The daily chart for Dogecoin shows Bollinger Bands squeezing, suggesting a significant price shift on the horizon. For more details, please refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
U.S. Embassy issues warning of potential Iran-backed militia attacks in Baghdad within two days, urging Americans to depart Iraq.

data.title: Pharming Group announces the filing of its 2025 Annual Report and Form 20-F
data.description: Pharming Group made an announcement today regarding the submission of its Annual Report for the year 2025, along with the Annual Report on Form 20-F. These reports can be accessed at annualreport.pharming.com.

data.title: Tallinna Sadam audited Annual Report 2025 and dividend proposal
data.description: The governing board of AS Tallinna Sadam (referred to as "Tallinna Sadam") has endorsed the audited yearly report for 2025 as presented by the executive board. The audited financial results remain consistent with the unaudited interim report released on 26 February, showing no variations.

data.title: LHV Varahaldus extends the term of office of a Supervisory Board Member
data.description: AS LHV Group, the only shareholder, has chosen to prolong the tenure of Andres Viisemann, a Supervisory Board member of its subsidiary AS LHV Varahaldus, by an additional five years. Viisemann will now serve until 01 April 2031.
